name: MIPS Road Bicycle Helmet
description: Lightweight road cycling helmet with MIPS brain protection, 18 aerodynamic vents, and adjustable retention system.

specifications.value: Matte White, Matte Black, Aero Blue, Orange

reviews.title: Excellent MIPS helmet for road cycling
reviews.reviewText: Lightweight, well-ventilated, and the MIPS liner gives genuine peace of mind. The dial retention system locks in a comfortable fit with precision. Great value for a certified MIPS helmet.

reviews.title: Secure and well ventilated
reviews.reviewText: The 18 vents keep my head cool even on longer climbs. Fitting is intuitive and the MIPS layer sits flush without feeling bulky. Highly recommend for commuters and recreational riders alike.

reviews.title: Great helmet with MIPS safety tech
reviews.reviewText: Solid construction and the retention dial fits my head well. The ventilation is noticeably good. Colour options are attractive. One minor note: the chin strap adjustment is a little fiddly.
